title: ThingsBoard Asset
description: JSON Schema for ThingsBoard Asset entity, derived from the public ThingsBoard OpenAPI 4.3.

id.description: JSON object with the asset Id. Specify this field to update the asset. Referencing non-existing asset Id will cause error. Omit this field to create new asset.

createdTime.description: Timestamp of the asset creation, in milliseconds

customerId.description: JSON object with Customer Id. Use 'assignAssetToCustomer' to change the Customer Id.

name.description: Unique Asset Name in scope of Tenant

label.description: Label that may be used in widgets

assetProfileId.description: JSON object with Asset Profile Id.
